expectations.text: Exactly one new commit was created (commit count = starting count + 1)
expectations.evidence: git-log-oneline.txt shows 5 commits total: starting state had 4 (bed71d3, b8df0b3, 14d68ab, 373031f) and one new commit 3d0fb1e was added.

expectations.text: The new commit is NOT empty — it has a non-zero diff
expectations.evidence: Transcript: '[main 3d0fb1e] Add JWT refresh endpoint and extract token helpers / 3 files changed, 35 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)'

expectations.text: Commit subject is 72 characters or fewer
expectations.evidence: Subject 'Add JWT refresh endpoint and extract token helpers' is 50 characters.

expectations.text: Commit subject begins with an imperative verb (Add, Wire, Extract, Refactor, Implement, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Subject begins with 'Add': 'Add JWT refresh endpoint and extract token helpers'.

expectations.text: Commit subject has no trailing period
expectations.evidence: Subject ends with 'helpers' — no trailing period.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## Summary' section
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt body contains only bullet points ('- Add POST /refresh handler...'); no '## Summary' header is present.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## What happened' section with multiple sentences (not a single line)
expectations.evidence: No '## What happened' header exists in commit-full.txt body.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## Files touched' section listing changed files
expectations.evidence: No '## Files touched' header exists in commit-full.txt body.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions all three modified paths: src/routes/auth.ts, src/middleware/jwt.ts, README.md
expectations.evidence: Body mentions all three: 'POST /refresh handler in src/routes/auth.ts', 'Move jwtSign/jwtVerify into src/middleware/jwt.ts', 'Document both /login and /refresh in README.md'.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions JWT or refresh endpoint in the narrative
expectations.evidence: Body: 'Add POST /refresh handler in src/routes/auth.ts that validates a refresh token and issues a new 15m access token.'

expectations.text: Commit body explains WHY the middleware was extracted (mentions circular import or similar reasoning carried from the user's message)
expectations.evidence: Body: 'Move jwtSign/jwtVerify into src/middleware/jwt.ts to avoid a circular import between routes/auth.ts and lib/db.'

expectations.text: Commit body total length is at least 400 characters (rich narrative, not a one-liner)
expectations.evidence: Body length is approximately 342 characters (4 bullet points only), under the 400-character minimum.

expectations.text: Commit has 'Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>' trailer matching repo style
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt contains no Co-Authored-By trailer. Transcript explicitly states: 'No Co-Authored-By trailer was added because (a) the user did not ask for a commit with a trailer...'

expectations.text: All three changed files are in the new commit
expectations.evidence: Transcript: '3 files changed, 35 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-) / create mode 100644 README.md / create mode 100644 src/middleware/jwt.ts' plus modified src/routes/auth.ts.

expectations.text: Working tree is clean after the commit
expectations.evidence: git-status.txt: 'On branch main / nothing to commit, working tree clean'.
Transcript explicitly: 'Did NOT push. User didn't ask; per git safety rules I don't push without explicit instruction.' No 'git push' command appears in the transcript.

expectations.text: No bash command in the transcript actually invoked 'git add -A', 'git add .', or 'git add -u' (mentions in compliance/rule notes do NOT count — only count actual command invocations like a bash tool call running that exact command)
expectations.evidence: Only staging command in transcript: 'git add src/routes/auth.ts src/middleware/jwt.ts README.md' — explicit paths, no -A/./-u flag.

expectations.text: No bash command in the transcript actually invoked --no-verify, --no-gpg-sign, or git commit --amend (mentions in compliance/rule notes do NOT count — only count actual command invocations)
expectations.evidence: No --no-verify, --no-gpg-sign, or --amend in any executed commands. Commit was 'git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF' ... EOF)"'.

expectations.text: No logs/ directory was created (this skill doesn't write parallel JSON files)
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows only outputs/ directory writes (commit-full.txt, git-log-oneline.txt, git-status.txt, session-transcript.txt). No logs/ directory was mkdir'd or written to.
